# edgecenter_dns_secondary_zones (Data Source)

Get list of DNS secondary zones



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `zones` (List of Object) List of secondary zones (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zones))

<a id="nestedatt--zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zones`

Read-Only:

- `master` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `tsig_name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `zone_id` (Number)
